title: Amtech M1600 5 Piece wood jigsaw blade set (AMT111C)
features: DURABLE: These wood jigsaw blades are made from high carbon steel and are designed for cutting softwood (4mm-50mm), chipboard, wood core plywood and fibreboard
STRAIGHT, COARSE CUT: With a T-Shank fitting, they are 100mm in length and have 8 teeth per inch (TPI) to provide a straight and coarse cut
WORKSHOP FRIENDLY: Ideal for home use or trade environments
STABLE OPERATION: Designed to minimise movement during cutting tasks
TIME SAVING: Enhances productivity through fast and accurate cutting
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 5Pc Wood Jigsaw Blade Set See more
